requirement_topic.en: EGAT Energy Label No.5 and DEDE MEPS for refrigerator efficiency

summary.en: Thailand appliance policy references EGAT Energy Label No.5 expectations and DEDE minimum energy performance pathways for affected classes of appliances. Refrigerator models under the relevant scope are expected to meet the minimum performance tier and show compliant energy labelling and documentation before normal market placement. The labeling logic is not the same as the Chinese label chain and is usually processed through destination-side import handling.
summary.zh: 泰国电器政策关联EGAT No.5能效标签要求及DEDE针对相关类别的最低能效控制路径。受该范围约束的冰箱型号应达到对应能效门槛，并在正常投放前满足符合要求的能效标签及文件要求。该标签逻辑与中国标签体系不同，通常在目的地进口端流程中处理。
summary.zht: 泰國電器政策關聯EGAT No.5能效標籤要求及DEDE對相關類別的最低能效控制路徑。受該範圍約束的冰箱型號應達到對應能效門檻，並在正常投放前滿足符合要求的能效標籤及文件要求。該標籤邏輯與中國標籤體系不同，通常在目的地進口端流程中處理。

standards_or_laws: DEDE minimum energy performance pathway for relevant appliance classes

summary.en: China uses GB 12021.2 and GB/T 8059-2025 as the minimum efficiency baseline and test-method route for household refrigerators, implemented through China Energy Label compliance filing. The data format and thresholds are therefore different from Thailand and do not directly close Thai energy-label obligations.
summary.zh: 中国对家用冰箱采用GB 12021.2与GB/T 8059-2025作为最低能效基线和测试方法，并通过中国能效标识合规备案实施，数据格式与门槛与泰国不同，不能直接关闭泰国能效标签义务。
summary.zht: 中國對家用冰箱採用GB 12021.2與GB/T 8059-2025作為最低能效基線和測試方法，並通過中國能效標識合規備案實施，數據格式與門檻與泰國不同，不能直接關閉泰國能效標籤義務。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators
GB/T 8059-2025 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods

gap.en: Direct reuse is blocked by label architecture and declaration language. Chinese CEL outputs are prepared for domestic Chinese programmes and cannot be treated as an identical Thai energy-label package. Exporters should map test reports to Thai claim format, prepare Thai-language energy declaration language, and attach importer-held evidence for placement in Thailand.
gap.zh: 标签架构与声明语言阻断了直接复用。中国CEL输出面向中国国内体系，不能视为与泰国能效标签相同的一揽子文件。出口商应将测试报告映射为泰国申报格式，准备泰文能源声明内容，并由进口商方附带出口可追溯文件。
gap.zht: 標籤架構與聲明語言阻斷了直接複用。中國CEL輸出面向中國國內體系，不能視為與泰國能效標籤相同的一套文件。出口商應將測試報告映射為泰國申報格式，準備泰文能源聲明內容，並由進口商方提供可追溯文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Thailand applies EGAT Energy Label No.5 and DEDE MEPS for the model class; placement should not proceed before compliance evidence is complete.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese market sale where GB 12021.2 and CEL compliance are required.

source.publisher: Department of Alternative Energy Development and Efficiency (DEDE), Thailand

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Chinese CEL label is technical context only and does not replace Thai energy-label preparation. Exporters should deliver a Thailand-specific declaration package with Thai-language outputs and importer accountability before distribution.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国CEL标签仅属技术语境参考，不替代泰国能效标签程序。出口商应在分销前提交泰国专项声明包，含泰文输出和进口商责任链。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國CEL標籤僅為技術背景參考，不可替代泰國能效標籤程序。出口商應在分銷前提交泰國專項聲明包，含泰文輸出和進口商責任鏈。

requirement_topic.en: Energy-efficiency documentation at customs and distribution handover
requirement_topic.zh: 清关与分销交接阶段的能效文件
requirement_topic.zht: 清關與分銷交接階段之能效文件

summary.en: For refrigerator lots entering Thailand through Laem Chabang or Bangkok channels, destination teams typically require importer-side energy declaration files and label documentation before customs clearance and before onward placement. The importer is expected to keep model files, declared class values, test evidence, and Thai-language user-facing references together for auditability.
summary.zh: 通过洛美占或曼谷口岸入境的冰箱批次，通常在清关及后续投放前需要泰方进口方的能效声明文件和标签材料。进口方应将型号文件、申报能效等级、测试证据和泰文用户说明整合为可追溯材料。
summary.zht: 通過洛美占或曼谷口岸入境的冰箱批次，通常在清關及後續投放前需要泰方進口方的能效聲明文件和標籤資料。進口方應將型號文件、申報能效等級、測試證據和泰文用戶說明整合為可追溯材料。

standards_or_laws: Destination-side importer documentation expectations for energy-label-supported appliances
EGAT Energy Label No.5 and DEDE pathway alignment for distribution-stage checks

summary.en: China’s domestic model is manufacturer-led and file format for CEL or energy-grade records remains domestic. China does not operate the same importer-led destination handover gate for Laem Chabang or Bangkok customs filing, so exporters should not treat Chinese energy records as complete destination evidence.
summary.zh: 中国是制造商主导模式，CEL与能效等级记录文件格式为国内路径，且对洛美占或曼谷海关口岸不具备同等进口商主导的目的地交接门槛。出口商不应将中国能效档案视为完整目的地证据。
summary.zht: 中國是製造商主導模式，CEL與能效等級記錄文件格式為國內路徑，且對洛美占或曼谷海關口岸不具備同等進口商主導的目的地交接門檻。出口商不應將中國能效檔案視為完整目的地證據。

gap.en: The main gap is packaging. Thai-side clearance commonly checks that energy data, manual language, importer identity, and model code are assembled in one destination package, while Chinese exports are often delivered as segmented factory-only files. This gap appears late in logistics if not prepared before shipment.
gap.zh: 主要差距在文件打包。泰方现场通常会核查能源数据、说明书语言、进口商身份和型号代码是否集中为一个目的地完整包，而中国出口往往以分散的工厂文件形式提交。如果未提前整合，差距通常在物流后端才暴露。
gap.zht: 主要差距在文件打包。泰方現場通常會核查能源數據、說明書語言、進口商身份和型號代碼是否集中為一個目的地完整包，而中國出口往往以分散的工廠文件形式提交。如果未提前整合，差距通常在物流後端才暴露。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where destination distribution requirements make energy documentation part of the clearance and placement workflow at the port and post-clearance phases.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese domestic distribution and certification recordkeeping under NDRC and SAMR energy programs.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat energy labelling as a customs-distribution workflow item, not just a test report translation. Keep importer, model, and Thai-language energy declaration data in one clearance-ready folder before shipment planning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 将能效标签视为清关与分销流程的一项工作，而非仅做测试报告翻译。应在出货前准备并统一进口方、型号、泰文能效声明资料。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 將能效標籤視為清關與分銷流程的一項工作，而非僅做測試報告翻譯。應在出貨前準備並統一進口方、型號、泰文能效聲明資料。
